name: Irish Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the potatoes.
2. Slice the onion.
3. Make a roux and fry the onions.
4. Add tomatoes, salt, and potatoes together until combined.
5. Let everything simmer together until the tomatoes are creamy.
6. Add enough water to achieve the desired consistency.
7. Stir in parsley, green onions, salt, and pepper as desired.
8. When the potatoes are cooked, mash through a strainer and return to heat.
9. Bring to a boil.
10. Bread the egg and let it fall slowly into the soup while stirring.
11. Serve hot.
